component.name: UMML Manager
component.summary: Browse, edit, profile, and deploy UM:PD mods

description.p: UMML Manager provides an immutable mod library, profiles, load order, conflict previews, and verified transactional deployment.
It detects supported game installations, browses Global and Japan Umamusume GameBanana mods, finds compatible local packages, creates editable copies, and rejects stale or incompatible profile plans.
The built-in Studio preserves the legacy loader's character, dress, training, story, model-swap, translation, cleanup, database, preview, manual-load, and restore tools.

Adds a full source audit, versioned persistent schemas, path-contained and hash-verified deployment, target-scoped baselines, durable recovery journals, tamper detection, stale metadata checks, provider/backend contracts, and an expanded adversarial test suite.
Fixes portable HTTPS trust on Fedora/Bazzite and other Linux families while retaining mandatory certificate verification.
Adds an AppImage built from the same frozen runtime as the Debian package, shared checksum artifacts, package-parity checks, and bounded archive extraction.
Separates source application files from user data, prevents stale launchers from shadowing the Debian package, and hardens profile, registry, deployment-state, import, and GameBanana behavior.
Adds first-launch Steam and Proton detection and automatically prepares the readable metadata database.
Adds the polished multi-workspace interface, GameBanana browser, local mod detection, editable workspaces, and complete legacy Studio compatibility.
Initial separately packaged manager foundation with profiles, conflict resolution, transactional deployment, and GameBanana import.
